subcodes.first_line: O faithful deputy of the friends! Although the simple-hearted mother heeded not thy counsel and accepted not thy wise exhortation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای نائب مناب یاران هر چند والده ساده دل گوش بفرمایش شما ننمود و پند و نصیحت
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @thankfulness; gratitude, @consolation and comfort
